author: Skywing*
title: App closes itself every 2-3 songs
content:
I've purchased the "Evermusic" app and upgraded it to the premium version, however, even in "repeat all" mode, it always turns itself off every 2-3 songs. I love this app but it's really annoying... Hope the problem can be fixed or even refunded.
I would like to purchase the Flacbox app which is without the problem and even better. Thank you.
